title: Lucid Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
text: Lucid announced Q4 2025 results showing full-year 2025 deliveries of 15,841 vehicles achieving roughly doubled production year-over-year. Revenue grew but losses persisted at operational level. Gross margin continued negative but showed signs of improvement trajectory. Management provided 2026 guidance for 25,000-27,000 vehicles representing 40-51% growth. Cash position remained adequate with extended PIF funding extending runway. Q4 was strong quarter with Gravity contributing to mix. Results demonstrated meaningful production progress despite profitability remaining elusive.
